title: Street Fighter: The Legend of Chun-Li
original_title: Street Fighter: The Legend of Chun-Li
overview: When a teenager, Chun-Li witnesses the kidnapping of her father by wealthy crime lord M. Bison. When she grows up, she goes on a quest for vengeance and becomes the famous crime-fighter of the Street Fighter universe.
